data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Test run complete. Results: 4 passed, 2 failed. The 2 failing tests (tolerated_summary_present, red_zone_only_exits_zero) are expected RED failures — they test the not-yet-implemented TOLERATED feature. The 3 passing tests (no_index_no_behavior_change, pre_marker_failure_blocks, unparseable_output_fail_safe) verify existing/negative behavior.
